targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM module_results;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM secrets;
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ok')::float / COUNT(*) ELSE 0 END AS value FROM module_results;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ttp) AS value FROM module_results, unnest(mitre_ttp) AS ttp;

panels.title: Module Execution Log
panels.description: Recent module runs with status and timing

targets.rawSql: SELECT module_name, protocol, status, risk, started_at, ended_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ended_at - started_at))::int AS duration_sec, summary FROM module_results ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT module_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ok') AS success, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fail') AS failure, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'aborted') AS aborted, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'refused') AS refused FROM module_results GROUP BY module_name ORDER BY module_name;
SELECT risk AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM module_results GROUP BY risk ORDER BY value DESC;

SELECT ttp AS technique_id, COUNT(*) AS times_tested, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ok') AS successful, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'fail') AS failed, array_agg(DISTINCT module_name) AS modules FROM module_results, unnest(mitre_ttp) AS ttp GROUP BY ttp ORDER BY times_tested DESC;
